requirement_topic.en: ARSEL / E2C Grid Connection for BESS — 220/380 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements (Congo-Brazzaville)
requirement_topic.zh: ARSEL / E2C BESS并网——220/380 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求（刚果（布））
requirement_topic.zht: ARSEL / E2C BESS併網——220/380 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求（剛果（布））

summary.en: In Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo, capital Brazzaville — distinct from the DRC/Kinshasa), the electricity sector is regulated by ARSEL (Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité). The national utility is E2C (Energie Electrique du Congo), formerly SNE (Société Nationale d'Electricité). All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale and solar-hybrid storage projects — require ARSEL licensing and E2C grid-connection technical approval. Congo-Brazzaville's grid operates at 220/380 V (single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V) at 50 Hz — the same nominal voltages as China. The grid serves Brazzaville and Pointe-Noire as the main interconnected zones; much of the country relies on isolated mini-grids or off-grid systems. BESS projects in Congo-Brazzaville are predominantly solar-hybrid and donor/lender-financed (World Bank, AfDB, EU, bilateral); project technical specifications are therefore often set by international project owners or lenders and frequently reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series, including IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems). A publicly accessible E2C or ARSEL technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection has not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date. Project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from ARSEL and E2C.
summary.zh: 刚果（布）（刚果共和国，首都布拉柴维尔——有别于DRC/金沙萨）的电力行业由ARSEL（电力行业监管局）监管。国家电力公司为E2C（刚果电力公司），原名SNE（国家电力公司）。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模和太阳能混合储能项目——均须取得ARSEL许可和E2C并网技术批准。刚果（布）电网运行参数为220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）、50 Hz——与中国标称电压相同。电网主要服务于布拉柴维尔和波因特-诺瓦尔两大互联区域；全国大部分地区依赖孤立微电网或离网系统。刚果（布）BESS项目以太阳能混合项目为主，多由国际捐助方或贷款方（世界银行、非开行、欧盟、双边机构）融资；因此项目技术规格通常由国际项目业主或贷款方制定，并频繁引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认E2C或ARSEL公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件。项目专属并网协议条款须直接向ARSEL和E2C获取。
summary.zht: 剛果（布）（剛果共和國，首都布拉柴維爾——有別於DRC／金沙薩）的電力行業由ARSEL（電力行業監管局）監管。國家電力公司為E2C（剛果電力公司），原名SNE（國家電力公司）。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模和太陽能混合儲能項目——均須取得ARSEL許可和E2C併網技術批准。剛果（布）電網運行參數為220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）、50 Hz——與中國標稱電壓相同。電網主要服務於布拉柴維爾和波因特-諾瓦爾兩大互聯區域；全國大部分地區依賴孤立微電網或離網系統。剛果（布）BESS項目以太陽能混合項目為主，多由國際捐助方或貸款方（世界銀行、非開行、歐盟、雙邊機構）融資；因此項目技術規格通常由國際項目業主或貸款方制定，並頻繁引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認E2C或ARSEL公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件。項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向ARSEL和E2C獲取。

standards_or_laws: ARSEL (Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité) — Congo-Brazzaville electricity sector regulator; ARSEL licensing required for all generation and storage projects (unconfirmed BESS-specific published technical specification as of dataset date)

E2C (Energie Electrique du Congo, formerly SNE) — national utility grid operator; E2C technical approval required for all grid-connected BESS (unconfirmed BESS-specific published connection code as of dataset date)

IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference for donor/lender-financed projects)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Congo-Brazzaville grid parameters: 220/380 V (single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V) at 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — the same nominal voltage levels as Congo-Brazzaville, which reduces PCS hardware re-engineering requirements. However, PCS firmware protection parameters, anti-islanding settings, and communication protocols configured for China's grid must be reviewed and re-validated against ARSEL/E2C connection requirements and any project-specific IEC 62933 evidence obligations before commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与刚果（布）标称电压相同，从而降低了PCS硬件重新设计的需求。但针对中国电网配置的PCS固件保护参数、防孤岛设置及通信协议，在调试前须根据ARSEL/E2C并网要求和任何项目专属IEC 62933证据义务进行审查和重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與剛果（布）標稱電壓相同，從而降低了PCS硬件重新設計的需求。但針對中國電網配置的PCS韌體保護參數、防孤島設置及通訊協議，在調試前須根據ARSEL/E2C併網要求和任何項目專屬IEC 62933證據義務進行審查和重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ARSEL/E2C grid-connection requirements in Congo-Brazzaville. Key points: (a) grid voltage parity — Congo-Brazzaville operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz, matching China's nominal levels, which reduces PCS hardware re-engineering; however, actual grid conditions (voltage stability, frequency excursions, short-circuit capacity) in Congo-Brazzaville's network are substantially different from China's and must be characterised before PCS protection settings are finalised; (b) ARSEL licensing — obtain project-specific ARSEL operating licence before equipment procurement; engage ARSEL at the earliest project stage to determine applicable technical requirements; (c) IEC 62933 evidence — for donor/lender-financed projects, project specifications typically require IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) communication and SCADA protocols — confirm the protocol required by E2C for BESS monitoring and dispatch (IEC 61850, Modbus, or project-specific); (e) equatorial humidity — Congo-Brazzaville's equatorial climate (year-round high humidity and temperature) requires IP ratings and derating validated beyond standard Chinese GB test conditions; (f) no confirmed publicly accessible E2C/ARSEL BESS-specific connection code — direct engagement with E2C and ARSEL is essential.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足刚果（布）ARSEL/E2C并网要求。关键要点：（a）电网电压一致——刚果（布）运行于220/380 V 50 Hz，与中国标称水平相同，可降低PCS硬件重新设计需求；但刚果（布）电网实际运行条件（电压稳定性、频率偏差、短路容量）与中国差异显著，须在确定PCS保护参数前进行评估；（b）ARSEL许可——在设备采购前取得项目专属ARSEL运营许可；应在项目最早阶段与ARSEL接触以确定适用技术要求；（c）IEC 62933证据——捐助方/贷款方融资项目的规格通常要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2证据；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）通信和SCADA协议——确认E2C对BESS监控和调度所要求的协议（IEC 61850、Modbus或项目专属协议）；（e）赤道湿度——刚果（布）赤道气候（全年高湿度和高温）要求设备防护等级和降额经验证超越标准中国GB测试条件；（f）尚未确认E2C/ARSEL公开发布BESS专属并网规范——直接与E2C和ARSEL接触至关重要。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足剛果（布）ARSEL/E2C併網要求。關鍵要點：（a）電網電壓一致——剛果（布）運行於220/380 V 50 Hz，與中國標稱水平相同，可降低PCS硬件重新設計需求；但剛果（布）電網實際運行條件（電壓穩定性、頻率偏差、短路容量）與中國差異顯著，須在確定PCS保護參數前進行評估；（b）ARSEL許可——在設備採購前取得項目專屬ARSEL運營許可；應在項目最早階段與ARSEL接觸以確定適用技術要求；（c）IEC 62933證據——捐助方／貸款方融資項目的規格通常要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2證據；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）通訊和SCADA協議——確認E2C對BESS監控和調度所要求的協議（IEC 61850、Modbus或項目專屬協議）；（e）赤道濕度——剛果（布）赤道氣候（全年高濕度和高溫）要求設備防護等級和降額經驗證超越標準中國GB測試條件；（f）尚未確認E2C/ARSEL公開發布BESS專屬併網規範——直接與E2C和ARSEL接觸至關重要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARSEL licensing and E2C grid-connection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Congo-Brazzaville; BESS-specific published technical connection code has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — engage ARSEL and E2C directly
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Congo-Brazzaville

source.publisher: ARSEL (Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité) — Congo-Brazzaville electricity sector regulator

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Congo-Brazzaville ARSEL/E2C grid-connection requirements. Although Congo-Brazzaville shares the same nominal grid voltage (220/380 V 50 Hz) as China — reducing PCS hardware re-engineering — ARSEL licensing, E2C technical approval, IEC 62933 evidence for donor/lender-financed projects, and equatorial humidity derating validation are all additional requirements. No confirmed publicly accessible ARSEL/E2C BESS-specific connection code has been identified as of the dataset date. Direct engagement with ARSEL and E2C at the earliest project stage is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足刚果（布）ARSEL/E2C并网要求。尽管刚果（布）与中国共用相同的标称电网电压（220/380 V 50 Hz），可降低PCS硬件重新设计需求，但ARSEL许可、E2C技术批准、捐助方/贷款方融资项目所需的IEC 62933证据及赤道湿度降额验证均为额外要求。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ARSEL/E2C公开发布BESS专属并网规范。在设备采购最终确定前，在项目最早阶段直接与ARSEL和E2C接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足剛果（布）ARSEL/E2C併網要求。儘管剛果（布）與中國共用相同的標稱電網電壓（220/380 V 50 Hz），可降低PCS硬件重新設計需求，但ARSEL許可、E2C技術批准、捐助方／貸款方融資項目所需的IEC 62933證據及赤道濕度降額驗證均為額外要求。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ARSEL/E2C公開發布BESS專屬併網規範。在設備採購最終確定前，在項目最早階段直接與ARSEL和E2C接觸至關重要。
